best_testcase_text: test case id: tc-service-003 title: service loop module: service source pages: 5 preconditions: user is logged in and an api exists. test data: - api name: api1 - version: v1 test steps: 1. user sends a request to the service. 2. service receives the request. 3. service processes the request. 4. service sends response back to user. 5. user sends another request to the service. 6. service receives the request. 7. service processes the request. 8. service sends response back to user. expected result: user receives a successful request handling response for both requests.

best_testcase_text: test case id: tc-login-004 title: empty username module: login source pages: 2,3,4 preconditions: user leaves the username field empty. test data: - username: - password: valid_password test steps: 1. user leaves the username field empty. 2. user enters valid password. 3. user clicks login button. 4. api manager receives login request. 5. api manager verifies credentials. 6. api manager sends response back to user. expected result: user receives an unsuccessful login response due to empty username.
